tier_1.title: Bison Stampede
tier_1.description: A thunder that isn't thunder. The horizon moves. Thousands of tons of muscle and horn heading straight for you.
tier_1.success: You spot the dust cloud early and steer perpendicular to the herd's path.
tier_1.failure: Caught in the fringe. Everyone sprints and dives. Half a day lost to scattered packs and shaken nerves.

tier_1.title: Lightning Storm
tier_1.description: The only trees for miles are where you're standing. The clouds above are building fast.
tier_1.success: You find a dry gully and shelter low until the storm passes.
tier_1.failure: You're in the open when it hits. Everyone is shaken and drenched.

tier_1.title: Farmstead
tier_1.description: A working farm with smoke rising from the chimney.
tier_1.success: The farmer trades fresh bread and salted pork for a fair price.
tier_1.failure: The farmstead is shuttered. No answer at the door.

tier_2.title: Wandering Merchant
tier_2.description: A lone wagon under a faded canvas canopy. The merchant waves from the driver's bench.
tier_2.success: Good prices and better rumors. You resupply and learn the road ahead.
tier_2.failure: His prices are outrageous and his wares questionable. Not worth it.

tier_2.title: Plains Raiders
tier_2.description: Riders on the horizon. They've spotted you and turned.
tier_2.success: You see them before they see you. A long detour and they never get close.
tier_2.failure: They ride you down. Fast horses on flat ground.

tier_3.title: Bandit Army
tier_3.description: Not raiders — an army. Hundreds of armed deserters have claimed this stretch of road. They have archers, a command tent, and demands.
tier_3.success: You negotiate safe passage with a combination of coin and information about a mutual enemy.
tier_3.failure: Negotiations collapse. They want everything you have.
tier_3.notes: On success the party pays a toll (DM sets cost). On failure, combat with a bandit warband of tier 3 difficulty.

tier_3.title: Prairie Fire
tier_3.description: The wind shifts and smoke fills your lungs. The grass behind you is already burning.
tier_3.success: You run for the river you spotted earlier. The fire skips over the wet ground.
tier_3.failure: The fire outpaces you. You survive but lose packs and supplies.

tier_4.title: Dragon Sighting
tier_4.description: A shadow blots out the afternoon sun. It circles once, twice. There is nowhere to hide on open ground. It is deciding.
tier_4.success: You flatten, douse fires, and wait. It departs for easier prey.
tier_4.failure: It lands. The ground shakes. It has questions — or it's simply hungry.
tier_4.notes: On failure the DM may offer a parley option before combat: the dragon wants something and will let the party go if they can provide it.
